title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: Dusting the API scrolls
gist.blurb: Polly's automated helpers just swept through the API documentation to keep everything perfectly in sync with the latest production deploy.
gist.summary: Automated synchronization of APIDOCS.md with the latest OpenAPI specification following a production deployment.
gist.impact: Developers referencing the API documentation will see the most up-to-date endpoint specifications.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a librarian's glasses, dusting off a giant glowing scroll of code in a cozy library setting. Nomnom creature eating some old dusty pages.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny librarian glasses, dusting off a glowing digital scroll of code in a warm, wood-paneled library. The round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a few dusty old pages nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
